'''Poe''' was a protocol droid owned by Grand Duke [[Gror Pernon]]. He acted as the [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] diplomatic liaison to the people of [[Eiattu 6]].

He later served on [[Elshandruu Pica]] as a valet in a resort, where his past connection to Rogue Squadron helped [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] get close to [[Sair Yonka]] and convince him to defect.

{{Droid-stub}}
